name: Mandeltorte
recipeInstructions:
1. Have 1/2 cup butter at room temperature.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and 1/3 cup sugar.
3. Cut the 1/2 cup butter into dry ingredients with a pastry blender until mixture resembles cornmeal.
4. Beat one egg and stir into flour mixture.
5. Pat dough into a 9-inch flan pan, pushing about 1/3 of the dough up against sides of pan.
6. Chill for 1/2 hour.
7. Soften remaining 1/2 cup butter and beat it with the remaining sugar until smooth.
8. Beat in two eggs one at a time, beating well between each addition.
9. Stir in almonds and almond extract.
10. Pour batter over dough.
11. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
12. Remove from oven and let cool for 1 hour.
13. Spread raspberry jam over the cooled torte.
14. Mix powdered sugar with enough lemon juice to form a spreadable icing.
15. Pipe the icing in a design over the top of the torte using a pastry bag fitted with a small hole.
